```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Perform hyperparameter tuning for model optimization"
---
# Hyperparameter Tuning
## Task
Tune model hyperparameters for optimal performance.
## Requirements
1. Define search space for key hyperparameters. 2. Use grid search, random search, or Bayesian optimization.
3. Implement cross-validation for evaluation. 4. Track all experiments with metrics.
5. Select best configuration and document.
## Constraints
- Set compute budget. Use early stopping. Log all trials. Prefer Bayesian for expensive models.
## Success Criteria
- Best hyperparameters found within budget. All trials logged. Cross-validated.
```
